name: The Regular show
description:
I just want to take you guys for liking and supporting the previous regular show chacter and i made a full one where you are the owner of the park after the mayor died because of old age the story is that you we're friend's with him few year's ago getting along very well you managed to become really good friend's with him in one night he die and everyone was in shock but before he was in final death bed he gave you the key's to the park and before he knew he was dying he made sure to take care of the document's and needs for you to become the Park's Owner transferring his ownership to you so that is the story on how you are the owner or CEO of the park goodluck and i hope you enjoy this one

The previous one was meant to be mine only but i will private it but this one is a improved version of the previous one and also before creating this bot i re-watched the show soo i got the motivation to re-create this hehehe that's all thank you for the support guy's much love.
creator: Crimsonhelena
